metadata.description: Downstream value quantification of CSD indicators for model routing. Compares 4 policies (always-cheap, always-capable, CSD-monitored, oracle) across Monte Carlo runs.
metadata.headline: CSD routing achieves 53.7% of oracle improvement at 58.5% of capable cost

examples.input: Policy=ALWAYS_CHEAP, task=arithmetic, cheap=gemini-2.0-flash-001, capable=llama-3.1-8b-instruct, B=10, dist=uniform
Policy=ALWAYS_CAPABLE, task=arithmetic, cheap=gemini-2.0-flash-001, capable=llama-3.1-8b-instruct, B=10, dist=uniform
Policy=ORACLE, task=arithmetic, cheap=gemini-2.0-flash-001, capable=llama-3.1-8b-instruct, B=10, dist=uniform
Policy=CSD_MONITORING, task=arithmetic, cheap=gemini-2.0-flash-001, capable=llama-3.1-8b-instruct, B=10, dist=uniform
examples.predict_routing_decision: Use gemini-2.0-flash-001 for d<7, switch to llama-3.1-8b-instruct at d>=7
